name: Fancy Spritz Cookies
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 375°F. Prepare a baking sheet with cooking spray. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, salt, and sugar. In a blender, grind the almonds to a powder-fine consistency. In a mixing bowl, combine margarine, egg white, vanilla, and almond extract. Mix dry ingredients with wet ingredients just until moistened. Pack dough into cookie press. Keep unused portion of dough in the refrigerator. Press out desired shapes on prepared cookie sheet. Space the cookies 1 inch apart. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, or until cookies are pale gold in color.
